creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just some notes, more for myself that anything:

devel/qtcreator: Update for 15.0.0 is prepared that fixes build with Qt 6.8.x (tested)
graphics/py-python-poppler-qt5: Yet another problem due to our ancient setuptools, fixed in [1] with updated patch to devel/py-sip (tested)
textproc/sigil: Fixed upstream in [2] and [3] (not yet tested)
www/ladybird: Fixed upstream in [4] (not yet tested)

Still needs investigation:
net-im/telegram-desktop
i386-specific failures in multimedia and webengine

[1] https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports-kde/commit/e21a76a0b63d5ae05341ed19bc5190f64f257e28
[2] https://github.com/Sigil-Ebook/Sigil/commit/9b2773e08ba68f3d35c9f58696d8d1b78dd42e26
[3] https://github.com/Sigil-Ebook/Sigil/commit/08ed327cf220eca9c814ea2a65adace24a4cf3d9
[4] https://github.com/LadybirdBrowser/ladybird/commit/07400b515c3d8d03bf3d6e35c26ec8a3d7317560

CCing maintainers/resident caretakers.
